data.text: The implementation is already present at base-rev. HTTP routes (`/api/mcp-servers`, `/api/plugins`), handlers (`handleListMCPServers`, `handleListPlugins` in `internal/server/plugins.go`), MCP tools (`ddx_list_mcp_servers`, `ddx_list_plugins` registered in `internal/server/server.go`), and tests (`internal/server/plugins_test.go`) all exist and pass.

input.content:
No code changes required: the bead's contract is already satisfied at base-rev 3804cf1f.

What is done (already merged in HEAD):
- HTTP routes registered in cli/internal/server/server.go:747-748
    trusted("GET /api/mcp-servers", s.handleListMCPServers)
    trusted("GET /api/plugins",     s.handleListPlugins)
- Handlers implemented in cli/internal/server/plugins.go
    handleListMCPServers reads <library>/mcp-servers/registry.yml
    handleListPlugins    reads ~/.ddx/installed.yaml via registry.LoadState()
- MCP tools registered in cli/internal/server/server.go:3414-3431
    ddx_list_mcp_servers (description: "List MCP servers available in the DDx library registry")
    ddx_list_plugins     (description: "List installed DDx plugins")
- MCP dispatch wired in cli/internal/server/server.go:3466-3467 and 3646-3647
    case "ddx_list_plugins":     return s.mcpListPlugins()
    case "ddx_list_mcp_servers": return s.mcpListMCPServers(workingDir)
- Tests in cli/internal/server/plugins_test.go cover both HTTP and MCP paths
  and pass: `go test ./internal/server -run "Plugins|MCP|HTTPMCPServers"` → ok 16.9s
- The full MCP tool list test (cli/internal/server/server_test.go:1312) already
  asserts both ddx_list_mcp_servers and ddx_list_plugins are advertised.

The earlier REVIEW:BLOCK (in the bead notes) was correct that an immediately
prior attempt's diff contained only execution evidence and no source. However,
between then and the current execution, commit 40ccc39b on main carried the
implementation forward; checkpoint 3804cf1f (this bead's base-rev) already
includes plugins.go, the route registrations, the MCP tool entries, and the
tests. There is nothing left to add and a no-op commit would be noise.

tools list stops advertising ddx_list_mcp_servers / ddx_list_plugins.
